sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INT, duration INTERVAL DAY TO SECOND);
INSERT INTO test_intervals (id, duration) VALUES (1, INTERVAL '5 12:30:15' DAY TO SECOND);
UPDATE test_intervals SET duration = duration + INTERVAL '1 02:00:00' DAY TO SECOND WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, duration, duration + INTERVAL '0 01:15:00' DAY TO SECOND AS extended_duration FROM test_intervals;
DELETE FROM test_intervals WHERE duration < INTERVAL '1 00:00:00' DAY TO SECOND;
